text:
```python
def rle_encode(s):
    if not s: return []
    encoded = []
    count = 1
    for i in range(1, len(s)):
        if s[i] == s[i-1]:
            count += 1
        else:
            encoded.append((s[i-1], count))
            count = 1
    encoded.append((s[-1], count))
    return encoded
```
